title: Vibrating Wither Fix
body:
# Vibrating Wither Fix ## Stop the wither vibrating
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/vibrating-wither-fix)




In Minecraft Java Edition, Withers have a bug in their path finding that can cause them to vibrate side to side. This pack aims to fix that by smoothing out the wither's animations.
